questions.question: Which example best matches unsupervised learning?
options: Predicting whether an email is spam using spam/not-spam labels
Grouping customers into segments based on purchase patterns without labels
Predicting a house price using past sales with known prices
Training an image model with images labeled by object type

questions.question: What is clustering?
options: Predicting a number from labeled data
Finding missing labels in a dataset
Measuring prediction error on a test set

questions.question: Why are unsupervised methods useful in many real problems?
options: They can be used when labels are expensive or unavailable
They always produce a single correct answer

questions.question: What does self-supervised learning do?
options: It creates pseudo-labels from the data itself
It avoids learning patterns from data
It can only be used for regression
